017package org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.functions;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.*;
020
021/**
022 * Type-conversion functions for the {@code #{...}} script catalog.
023 *
024 * <p>
025 * Useful as bridges between SVL's string-typed default and the native typed args expected by
026 * other functions or by application code. All four functions return their typed value rendered
027 * back as a String for SVL interop.
028 */
029public final class TypeConversionFunctions {
030
031   private TypeConversionFunctions() {}
032
033   /** All function classes in this category. */
034   @SuppressWarnings({
035      "unchecked", // Cast is safe: type verified by caller context.
036      "java:S2386" // ALL is an immutable compile-time registry; exposed as an array for the cross-package/varargs functions(...) API, so visibility cannot be reduced.
037   })
038   public static final Class<? extends VarFunction>[] ALL = new Class[] {
039      ToInt.class, ToLong.class, ToDouble.class, ToBool.class
040   };
041
042   /** {@code #{toInt(s)}} — coerces {@code s} to {@code int} and renders as a String. */
043   public static class ToInt extends TypedFunction {
044      @Override public String name() { return "toInt"; }
045      public String invoke(int x) { return String.valueOf(x); }
046   }
047
048   /** {@code #{toLong(s)}} — coerces {@code s} to {@code long} and renders as a String. */
049   public static class ToLong extends TypedFunction {
050      @Override public String name() { return "toLong"; }
051      public String invoke(long x) { return String.valueOf(x); }
052   }
053
054   /** {@code #{toDouble(s)}} — coerces {@code s} to {@code double} and renders as a String. */
055   public static class ToDouble extends TypedFunction {
056      @Override public String name() { return "toDouble"; }
057      public String invoke(double x) { return String.valueOf(x); }
058   }
059
060   /** {@code #{toBool(s)}} — coerces {@code s} to {@code boolean} and renders as a String. */
061   public static class ToBool extends TypedFunction {
062      @Override public String name() { return "toBool"; }
063      public String invoke(boolean x) { return String.valueOf(x); }
064   }
065}
